title: Stallari Catalog Entry
description: Schema for entries in the registry catalog (plugins/*.json). Supports both plugin and pack types via discriminated union on the 'type' field.

then.description: DD-265 belt-and-braces: library form factor requires an SPM dependency in stallari-harness/Package.swift — only first-party builds can produce library blades.

type.description: Entry type. Plugins provide MCP tools; packs are workflow manifests.

license.description: SPDX license identifier. Required for plugins.

contract.description: Domain contract identifier(s). String for single contract; array for multi-contract plugins (e.g. cloudflare-blade declares four). Required for plugins.

risk_class.description: DD-280 coarse risk class for this plugin's tool surface.

tools.description: DD-333 per-tool catalog inventory + granularity declarations. Required at pack-spec 4.0.0 (Phase D cutover 2026-05-21). Pairs with S-MCP-001 `.error` lint in stallari-secops-scanner. Per-tool, not per-blade: different tools in the same pack legitimately have different granularity — a blade with `list_notes` (server-side) + `dump_all` (no scope) declares each honestly.

name.description: MCP tool name as registered by the blade at list_tools time.

risk_class.description: DD-280 risk class per tool. Per-tool declaration takes precedence over the plugin-level risk_class for tools that diverge from the blade's typical posture.

granularity.description: DD-333 four-dimension granularity declaration per tool. Required at pack-spec 4.0.0 (Phase D cutover 2026-05-21). Declare honestly — `client-side`/`none`/`unstable`/`minimal` is the correct declaration when that's the actual behaviour. The assembler's verdict logic refuses evidentiary-level packets through inferred-worst-case tools; honest under-declaration passes conformance.

scope_filtering.description: server-side: tool accepts a scope argument and the plugin honours it before bytes leave the plugin's address space (safe for over-fetch threat model). client-side: tool returns unfiltered results and the assembler filters post-hoc (carries over-fetch leak). none: tool has no concept of scope (data is naturally unscoped, or the plugin punts entirely).

field_projection.description: per-field: tool accepts a fields=[...] argument and returns only requested fields. top-level: tool returns a fixed projection (assembler must select the right tool variant, e.g. get_summary vs get_full). none: tool returns its native shape regardless of caller intent.

deterministic_ordering.description: stable: identical inputs produce identical output order (content_hash reproducible). unstable: output order varies between calls (hash will not reproduce). unsorted: tool explicitly returns an unordered set (assembler must sort to derive a hash).

audit_surface.description: structured: tool returns a _meta envelope alongside results (matched_total, returned, filtered_by, redactions) the assembler lifts into ContextPacket.provenance. minimal: tool returns only the data payload; assembler records call shape only. none: tool returns opaque data with no introspection.

runtime.description: Runtime kind. 'library' (DD-265) means the plugin is compiled into the Stallari daemon binary via SPM — never fetched, never installed; the consumer is the daemon process itself.

bundled_in.description: DD-265: name of the Stallari binary that compiles this library blade in (e.g. 'stallari-harness'). Set only when runtime == 'library'.

then.description: DD-265: library-runtime entries MUST NOT carry binary or package — the consumer is the daemon binary itself, not a separately-fetched artefact.

consent_tile_link.description: DD-265: deep-link (e.g. 'stallari://settings/general/local-corpus/mail') opened by the marketplace Manage button when runtime == 'library'. Optional — absence means render a passive Bundled tile with no Manage button (vault form factor).

author_type.description: Authorship class. DD-265: required for runtime == 'library' (must be 'first-party' — only first-party builds can edit Package.swift). Legacy values 'stallari' (≡ first-party) and 'third-party' (≡ community) remain accepted.

hidden.description: When true, the entry is excluded from the marketplace catalog build.

services.description: Abstract service names this entry provides or uses. Array of strings is the canonical shape; object form is legacy (apple-docs-mcp et al.).

pack_spec.description: Pack spec version (e.g. "1.0"). Present only for type=pack.

skill_count.description: Number of skills in this pack. Present only for type=pack.

conformance.description: Contract conformance test results. Primarily for plugins.

inference.description: Optional inference declaration for entries that embed LLM calls.

setup_complexity.description: Setup complexity from plugin setup.complexity. 'none' = no credentials needed. Null = not declared.

auth_model.description: Primary authentication model from plugin setup metadata.

credential_count.description: Number of credential fields required. 0 = no setup needed.
